steps.title: Identify the relationship and radius
steps.content: Mass equals density times volume. The diameter is $31.000$ cm, so the radius is $r=\frac{31}{2}=15.5$ cm. Use density $2.6$ g/cm³ and $\pi=3.14159$.

steps.title: Calculate sphere volume
steps.content:
First cube the radius: $(15.5)^3=3{,}723.875$. Then apply the sphere volume formula:
$$V=\frac{4}{3}(3.14159)(3{,}723.875)\approx15{,}598.52$$

steps.title: Calculate the mass
steps.content:
Multiply by the density:
$$2.6(15{,}598.52)\approx40{,}556$$
The mass is 40,556 grams.
